The '''WESTAR-M5 blaster rifle''' was a [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]] used during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] by the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]].

==Description==
[[File:ARC_blaster.png|220px|left|thumb|Another view of the WESTAR-M5]]
The [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] rifle could be calibrated to fire in semi-automatic, automatic, and burst-fire modes, and could be equipped with a variety of attachments, including an [[under-barrel grenade launcher]] that could be used against armored enemies.

This blaster improved on the DC-15 design, making it easier to aim. It featured an extendable stock and a larger ammunition magazine.

==History==
[[File:Alpha17-SWR50.jpg|thumb|right|180px|An [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commando]] wielding a WESTAR-M5.]]
This weapon was seen as being very effective on such missions as the [[Battle of Muunilinst/Legends|Battle of Muunilinst]], where not only did it prove useful in providing rapid cover fire, but also being able to break through the armor on the top of an [[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|Armored Assault Tank]] and disable it with several shots from the inside. The WESTAR-M5 also proved effective on [[Hypori/Legends|Hypori]] when a [[The Muunilinst 10|crack team]] of ARC troopers were sent to the planet Hypori to rescue the surviving [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] that were commissioned there. The ARCs made great use of the attachable one-shot pump-action missile launcher and the rapid and powerful bursts of the gun to buy time for their teammates to save the surviving [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi Generals]].

WESTAR-M5 blaster rifles were mainly used by the [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commandos]] and [[Galactic Marines/Legends|Galactic Marines]] during the later years of the Clone Wars.<ref name="SWG:WBR" />

This gun proved its effectiveness in a variety of situations and was indeed a powerful and useful weapon that was employed with deadly efficiency by the [[Alpha-class Advanced Recon Commando|Alpha-class]] ARC troopers.

==Behind the scenes==
The WESTAR-M5 blaster rifle appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:WBR" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The WESTAR-M5 blaster rifle was a reward for being successful in the [[Wikipedia:Player versus player|player versus player]] "[[:w:c:swg:Battlefield|battlefields]]" introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Game Update 10|Game Update 10]],"<ref name="SWG:WBR" /> on [[June 2]], [[2009]].<ref name="SonyForumsCite-Star Wars Galaxies: Game Update 10">{{SonyForumsCite|url=swg/posts/list.m?topic_id=927421|text=Star Wars Galaxies: Game Update 10}}</ref>
